interaction_phrase: a Brooklyn, NY-based quantum technology spinoff from Stony Brook University
occurrence_sentence: The research was performed in collaboration with scientists from Qunnect, Inc., a Brooklyn, NY-based quantum technology spinoff from Stony Brook University, and with international colleagues from the University of Padova in Italy.
